title: PACK'N PRIDE Dog Treats, 10 Pack*90g (900g) Dog Chews, Chewy Twists with Chicken&Duck, Low Fat Natural Treats for Small&Medium Dogs
features: Real Meat - Dog chew sticks made of cowhide wrapped with human-grade natural chicken/duck breast meat, pure real meat winding, provide a chewy treat for your doggie
Safe&Tasty - Premium material with no additive, no soy or grain. It's safe and tasty; you can feed the dog without worrying
Low Air-Dried temperatures (60 °C) - Gently air-dried in the oven preserves valuable nutrients and original taste
Rich Nutrients - Dog chicken treats are low-fat and high-protein, containing calcium and minerals, providing additional nutrition to your furry friend

Multi-purpose for Dogs - Delicious chewy treats with chicken breast are the ideal reward for dogs, supporting dental care, freshening breath, pacifying anxiety, avoiding random biting, and satisfying the dog’s natural urge to chew
